meaning: v.散播,传播,漫射,扩散,(使)慢慢混合adj.散开的,弥漫的
examples: It allows nicotine to diffuse slowly and steadily into the bloodstream.
The problem is how to diffuse power without creating anarchy.
What experiences do Grisham and Rize Up Gaming draw upon to diffuse online environments?
The panels also recover the energy produced by diffuse light more efficiently than traditional panels.
